200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Event: Spring Festival 2026

Event date: 01/03/2026

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once every 7 sec., the Forest Watcher removes all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly or fear from self, and casts improved restoration upon self and all allied units in a large radius around. It removes 3 random negative effects from the targets, and they restore 35% health. All their stats are increased by 35% for 3 sec. as well.

description 4/6

Once every 7 sec., the Forest Watcher removes all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly or fear from self, and casts improved restoration upon self and all allied units in a large radius around. It removes 4 random negative effects from the targets, and they restore 40% health. All their stats are increased by 40% for 4 sec. as well. Once in a while, the Forest Watcher fires magic bullets at 3 enemy units with the greatest spell power. The targets receive pure damage equal to 75% of their spell power, and a spiky vine entangles them. For 4 sec., they cannot move or use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). Every second during that time, exhaustion is applied to the entangled enemy units. They receive physical damage equal to 225% of the Forest Watcher's attack every second. While the enemy units are exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 20%. The exhaustion lasts for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times

description 6/6

Once every 7 sec., the Forest Watcher removes all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly or fear from self, and casts improved restoration upon self and all allied units in a large radius around. It removes 5 random negative effects from the targets, and they restore 45% health. All their stats are increased by 45% for 5 sec. as well. Once in a while, the Forest Watcher fires magic bullets at 4 enemy units with the greatest spell power. The targets receive pure damage equal to 85% of their spell power, and a spiky vine entangles them. For 5 sec., they cannot move or use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). Every second during that time, exhaustion is applied to the entangled enemy units. They receive physical damage equal to 250% of the Forest Watcher's attack every second. While the enemy units are exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 25%. The exhaustion lasts for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Once in a while, the Forest Watcher receives a shield of nature that blocks 80% damage of any type and exists up to 5 sec. During that period, every time the Forest Watcher blocks damage, 2 random enemy units are afflicted with improved withering. It removes 4 random positive effects from them, and reduces all their stats by 25% for 5 sec. These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 35% of their maximum health. The ability's effect triggers at most once per 1 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, 3 nearest enemy units also have their armor torn. When a unit's armor is torn, that unit receives 550000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 40% for 4 sec. These enemies also receive 450000 physical damage for 4 sec.

description 4/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, 3 nearest enemy units also have their armor torn. When a unit's armor is torn, that unit receives 550000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 40% for 4 sec. These enemies also receive 450000 physical damage for 4 sec. When the magic bullets hit, the Forest Watcher causes the targets to explode, dealing 400000 magic damage to the targets and all enemy units in a large radius around them.

description 6/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, 3 nearest enemy units also have their armor torn. When a unit's armor is torn, that unit receives 550000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 40% for 4 sec. These enemies also receive 450000 physical damage for 4 sec. When the magic bullets hit, the Forest Watcher causes the targets to explode, dealing 400000 magic damage to the targets and all enemy units in a large radius around them. When the Forest Watcher applies improved withering from the set ability, the targets are also frightened for 4 sec. Every second for that duration, the Forest Watcher deals 200000 pure damage to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, a shield equal to 250% of the Watcher's attack is also applied to all allied units in a large radius around. The shield blocks damage of any type and exists up to 5 sec.

description 4/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, a shield equal to 250% of the Watcher's attack is also applied to all allied units in a large radius around. The shield blocks damage of any type and exists up to 5 sec. When the magic bullets hit, the Forest Watcher steals 25% of all stats from the targets for 5 sec.

description 6/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, a shield equal to 250% of the Watcher's attack is also applied to all allied units in a large radius around. The shield blocks damage of any type and exists up to 5 sec. When the magic bullets hit, the Forest Watcher steals 25% of all stats from the targets for 5 sec. If the Forest Watcher dies within 5 sec. after receiving the shield of nature, the Watcher and 2 allied units will be resurrected with 25% health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, the Watcher and all allied units in a large radius around become immune to movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly and fear for 5 sec.

description 4/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, the Watcher and all allied units in a large radius around become immune to movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly and fear for 5 sec. When the magic bullets hit, the Forest Watcher makes the targets unable to receive positive effects for 5 sec.

description 6/6

When the Forest Watcher applies improved restoration from the set ability, the Watcher and all allied units in a large radius around become immune to movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly and fear for 5 sec. When the magic bullets hit, the Forest Watcher makes the targets unable to receive positive effects for 5 sec. When the Forest Watcher applies improved withering from the set ability, the targets also receive pure damage equal to 300% of the Watcher's attack. If these enemies die within 4 sec. after receiving improved withering, they cannot be resurrected for 4 sec.

Materials

Sunblossom
Green Shoots
Wild Seeds
Emerald Leaf
Root of the Thicket
Suggested gears for the set
